value.found_quote: Codex builds an instruction chain when it starts (once per run; in the TUI this usually means once per launched session). Discovery follows this precedence order: 1. **Global scope:** ... 2. **Project scope:** ... 3. **Merge order:** Codex concatenates files from the root down, joining them with blank lines.
value.name: instruction chain: global-then-project precedence and merge order, rebuilt once per run
